name: idyllium-next
description: Next-generation core for the Idyllium educational programming language

scripts.test: npm run build && node dist/tests/smoke.test.js && node dist/tests/cli.test.js && node dist/tests/lesson-spec.test.js && node dist/tests/canvas-draft.test.js && node dist/tests/drawable-geometry.test.js && node dist/tests/drawable-origin-draft.test.js && node dist/tests/font-metrics.test.js && node dist/tests/widget-colors-draft.test.js && node dist/tests/widget-image-draft.test.js && node dist/tests/image-draft.test.js && node dist/tests/font-draft.test.js && node dist/tests/core-lessons-draft.test.js && node dist/tests/constants-draft.test.js && node dist/tests/file-system-draft.test.js && node dist/tests/json-draft.test.js && node dist/tests/sqlite-draft.test.js && node dist/tests/sqlite-inspector.test.js && node dist/tests/gui-renderer.test.js
